creator: stoa@gmx.us
text:
Updated ports to svn revision 403006 and upgrade with portmaster; errors out at net/wireshark due to

"===>>> All >> wireshark-1.12.8 (11/11)

===>>> Currently installed version: wireshark-1.12.8
===>>> Port directory: /usr/ports/net/wireshark

        ===>>> This port is marked IGNORE
        ===>>> cannot build with base Kerberos if krb5 port is installed."

Seems like this is the same or similar issue reported, and corrected, in bug 196671 earlier this year.

uname -a:
FreeBSD dutch.freebsd.net 10.2-RELEASE-p7 FreeBSD 10.2-RELEASE-p7 #0: Mon Nov  2 14:19:39 UTC 2015     root@amd64-builder.daemonology.net:/usr/obj/usr/src/sys/GENERIC  amd64

Please let me know if further information is needed.  Thanks.
